title: To Poe.
content:
You lived in a land horror-haunted,
        And wrote with a pen half-divine;
     You drank bitter sorrow, undaunted
        And cast precious pearls before swine.
meaning:
"To Poe." is a quintessential example of Edwin C. Ranck's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
